name: Lemon Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ingredients in the order given. Do not use a mixer or beat until frothy.
2. Pour into an 8-inch unbaked pie shell.
3. Place in a 350 degree oven and bake for 10 minutes.
4. Then cook at 300 degrees until the crust is brown (30 to 45 minutes), and the pie filling is set. Too rapid cooking causes pecans to scorch and crust to brown before the center is cooked.
For Orange Pecan Pie - substitute 1/2 fresh orange, juiced, and 1 teaspoon orange extract.
